Havensburg Bus Simulator

Navigate your bus through the bustling city of Havensburg! Pick up and drop off passengers at designated stops while following traffic rules. Complete routes within time limits to earn credits and unlock new buses and districts. Build your bus empire by expanding routes and maintaining a perfect safety record. Your goal: unlock all bus types and establish the most extensive transport network in the city!

Arrow Keys: Steer left/right and accelerate/brake | Space: Emergency brake | Shift: Honk horn | ESC: Pause/Unpause | R: Restart | Enter: Start game
